languages.text: Ювенна предлагает Себериану пойти на переговоры с Инквизицией. Возможно, если участники совета поддержат ее, такой исход разорвет временную петлю.

traits.locale_text: Ювенна предлагает Себериану пойти на переговоры с Инквизицией. Возможно, если участники совета поддержат ее, такой исход разорвет временную петлю.

languages.text: Juvenna proposes that Seberian negotiate with the Inquisition. If the council can be persuaded to support her, this outcome might break the temporal loop.
languages.original_text: Ювенна предлагает Себериану пойти на переговоры с Инквизицией. Возможно, если участники совета поддержат ее, такой исход разорвет временную петлю.

traits.locale_text: Juvenna proposes that Seberian enter into negotiations with the Inquisition. If the council can be persuaded to support her, such an outcome might shatter the temporal loop.
Juvenna proposes that Seberian enter into negotiations with the Inquisition. If the council can be persuaded to support her, such an outcome might shatter the temporal loop.
Juvenna proposes that Seberian negotiate with the Inquisition. If the council can be persuaded to support her, this outcome might break the temporal loop.
Juvenna proposes that Seberian negotiate with the Inquisition. If the council can be persuaded to support her, this outcome might break the temporal loop.

languages.text: Juvenna rät Seberian, mit der Inquisition zu verhandeln. Wenn sich der Rat überzeugen lässt, sie zu unterstützen, könnte dies die Zeitschleife durchbrechen.
languages.original_text: Juvenna proposes that Seberian negotiate with the Inquisition. If the council can be persuaded to support her, this outcome might break the temporal loop.

traits.locale_text: Juvenna rät Seberian, mit der Inquisition zu verhandeln. Wenn sich der Rat überzeugen lässt, sie zu unterstützen, könnte dies die Zeitschleife durchbrechen.

languages.text: Juvenna propose à Seberian de négocier avec l'Inquisition. Si le conseil se range à son avis, le résultat pourrait briser la boucle temporelle.
languages.original_text: Juvenna proposes that Seberian negotiate with the Inquisition. If the council can be persuaded to support her, this outcome might break the temporal loop.

traits.locale_text: Juvenna propose à Seberian de négocier avec l'Inquisition. Si le conseil se range à son avis, le résultat pourrait briser la boucle temporelle.

languages.text: 尤文娜提议塞贝里安与审判庭谈判。如果能说服军事议会支持她，或许能打破时间循环。
languages.original_text: Juvenna proposes that Seberian negotiate with the Inquisition. If the council can be persuaded to support her, this outcome might break the temporal loop.

traits.locale_text: 尤文娜提议塞贝里安与审判庭谈判。如果能说服军事议会支持她，或许能打破时间循环。

languages.text: Juvenna propone que Seberian negocie con la Inquisición. Si el consejo respaldase su propuesta, el desenlace podría romper el bucle temporal.
languages.original_text: Juvenna proposes that Seberian negotiate with the Inquisition. If the council can be persuaded to support her, this outcome might break the temporal loop.

traits.locale_text: Juvenna propone que Seberian negocie con la Inquisición. Si el consejo respaldase su propuesta, el desenlace podría romper el bucle temporal.

languages.text: ジュヴェンナはセベリアンに異端審問との交渉を提案する。おそらく評議会のメンバーが彼女を支持すれば、そのような結果はタイムループを断ち切るだろう。
languages.original_text: Juvenna suggests that Seberian go into negotiations with the Inquisition. Perhaps if the council members support her, such an outcome would break the time loop.

languages.text: Juvenna, Seberian'a Engizisyon'la müzakere etmesini öneriyor. Konsey onu desteklemeye ikna edilebilirse bu sonuç, zaman döngüsünü kırabilir.
languages.original_text: Juvenna proposes that Seberian negotiate with the Inquisition. If the council can be persuaded to support her, this outcome might break the temporal loop.

traits.locale_text: Juvenna, Seberian'a Engizisyon'la müzakere etmesini öneriyor. Konsey onu desteklemeye ikna edilebilirse bu sonuç, zaman döngüsünü kırabilir.
